title: wolfhsm/src/crypto: AES-GCM, SHA-256, CMAC, RNG modules
description: aes.rs (AesKey: KeyId + bits; gcm_encrypt/gcm_decrypt using shims). sha.rs (sha256 one-shot). cmac.rs (CmacKey: compute). rng.rs (generate(client, size) -> Vec<u8> via wh_Client_Rng). Add mod declarations and pub re-exports in crypto/mod.rs and lib.rs.
